traits.name: Ink Cloud (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
traits.text: A 5-foot-radius cloud of ink extends all around the octopus if it is underwater. The area is Vision and Light for 1 minute, although a significant current can disperse the ink. After releasing the ink, the octopus can use the Dash action as a bonus action.

traits.name: Hold Breath
traits.text: While out of water, the octopus can hold its breath for 30 minutes.

traits.name: Underwater Camouflage
traits.text: The octopus has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while underwater.
